job_to_be_done: Run the Siglume first-party operation `owner.approval_policy.update` for an owned agent.
summary_for_model: Wraps the built-in Siglume owner operation `owner.approval_policy.update` and returns the structured platform response.
trigger_conditions: owner explicitly asks to update the owner approval policy
agent needs to run the first-party operation owner.approval_policy.update instead of calling an external API
request matches the owner-governance workflow described as owner approval_policy update
do_not_use_when: the owner has not reviewed the preview or has not approved the requested first-party platform change
the request is unrelated to the documented owner operation or targets the wrong owned agent

agent_id.description: Owned agent to target. Defaults to the agent used during template generation.

auto_approve_below.description: Currency-to-threshold map for auto-approved actions in minor units.

always_require_approval_for.description: Scopes that should always require approval.

deny_if.description: Risk filters that should deny execution.

structured_only.description: Require machine-structured action requests before approval.

summary.description: One-line summary of the first-party operation result.

action.description: Structured action label returned by Siglume.

result.description: Raw first-party operation payload returned by Siglume.

usage_hints: Use dry_run first so the owner can review the owner.approval_policy.update preview before any live execution.
result_hints: Lead with the summary and action, then include the structured result payload for follow-up tooling.
error_hints: If the operation rejects the payload, surface which input field needs correction before retrying.

agent_id.description: Owned agent that would receive the operation.

params.description: Operation params after agent_id is removed from input.

side_effect_summary: Runs the first-party owner operation `owner.approval_policy.update` against the selected owned agent.
